reviews.review_description:
Didn’t thought that it was that difficult to just draw a line, to get the ball inside the hole. It starts easy, but it gets more difficult when your levels goes up.

But I like it. Very challenging game.

Acting as a chaotic magic artist with a brush that low-key bends physics? Sign me UP.  10+ wild modules? Different drawing materials that actually ACT differently? My brain’s already doing backflips trying to solve these puzzles, but in the best way possible. 🤯 The art style’s so cute it hurts, the music’s like a cozy hug for my ears, and MR + hand-tracking? Finally, a game that makes me feel like a real-life wizard instead of a potato mashing a screen. 🥔➡️🧙♂️ If you’re tryna flex those brain muscles while having a blast, this is *the* move. Trust me, once you start, you’ll be hooked—draw the line, solve the puzzle, repeat. Addictive as TikTok, but way smarter. 😏 Go get it, gamers!

Doodle Quest is a clever and creative MR puzzle game that blends logic, physics, and artistry. Your mission is simple: draw a single doodle to press a button and guide a ball to the exit — but simplicity ends there. Each level introduces new interactive elements like fans, lifts, and launchers, making every solution a fun and thoughtful challenge.

The genius lies in the minimalism. Fewer doodles mean more stars, encouraging you to think smarter and optimize your drawing. It's immensely satisfying when one perfect line triggers a full chain reaction across the environment. The MR flexibility means you can set up and play just about anywhere, whether standing, seated, or using your surroundings for extra flair.

Packed with missions and great replayability, Doodle Quest offers hours of rewarding gameplay. It’s both playful and strategic — an easy recommendation for anyone looking for fun, creativity, and challenge in mixed reality.

What's not to like? Tons of puzzles that will get you thinking outside the box to solve and there's not just a single solution either. The hand tracking seemed a little sensitive for me but works great with the controllers. I only wish you had both hands in the game and could easily swap which hand you were drawing with, but that's only a minor thing!

Check out my first impressions gameplay over on my YouTube channel!
😁✌️☮️❤️

I've been on the lookout for a game that could break the monotony of the typical mobile gaming scene, and Doodle Quest has more than delivered. It's a breath of fresh air, taking the simple concept of "Draw a line" and catapulting it into a whole new dimension - quite literally! The moment I started playing, I was immediately drawn in by its innovative approach. Transforming the classic 2D drawing mechanic into a 3D mixed - reality experience was pure genius. It was like stepping into a world where my wildest doodles could come to life and solve puzzles in ways I never thought possible. The support for MR see - through and hand - tracking game control was the cherry on top. It made the interaction with the game feel so natural. Looking forward to playing with the Level Editor that's coming soon as well.
A little monotonously delayed to discover new devices, but in general it's interesting and addictive

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. We will keep iterating and improve the levels to make it more fun!
